zh.Cham, Cham, Bavaria, German Empire: 可特格希 貝也貝爾可薩赤 陳陳
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rapoto IV. von Cham於大約1034年出生在可特格希 貝也貝爾可薩赤 陳陳時，他的父親Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau31歲，母親Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt29歲。他於1065年之前與Mathilde von Kastl結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1033年住在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 陳。他去世於1080年10月15日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特維斯費爾斯霍恩莫爾森享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rapoto IV. von Cham于大约1034年出生在可特格希 貝也貝爾可薩赤 陳陳时，他的父亲Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau31岁，母亲Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt29岁。他于1065年之前与Mathilde von Kastl结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1033年住在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 陳。他去世于1080年10月15日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特維斯費爾斯霍恩莫爾森享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Cham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Chun, Fei, Heng, Hong, Kam, Roeun, Kiem, Binh, Pha, Tung, Tuyen.  Arabic/Muslim Musa, Sheikh, Mustapha, Shahram, Suleiman.  French/Haitian Francoise, Hancy, Murielle, Yves.
West African (Gambia): variant of   Thiam  .
Vietnamese (Châm): unexplained.

variants.name: Thiam
meanings: West African (mainly Senegal, Mali, and Guinea): Fulani and Tukulor name, consisting of the root of the name Thiamaba, borne by the mythical ancestor of the Fulani. Compare Cham 1.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 程 (see   Cheng   1), 譚 (see   Tan   1) and 鄧 (see   Deng   1).

nameMeanings.name: Rapoto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Antonio, Luis, Carlos, Jaime, Adriana, Alfonso, Americo, Ana, Eduardo, Fernando, Francisco.  Portuguese Joao, Duarte, Henrique, Paulo, Serafim, Vasco.
Portuguese: variant of   Raposa  .

variants.name: Raposa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Adelino, Julio, Raul, Aldina, Alicia, Alvarino, Ana, Carlos, Dionisio, Elvira.
Portuguese:
habitational name from Raposa, a town in Portugal.

variants.name: Rapozo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Portuguese Duarte, Joao.
Portuguese: variant of   Raposo  .

nameMeanings.name: IV.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Rapoto IV. von Cham was born about 1034, in Cham, Cham, Bavaria, his father, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, was 31 and his mother, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, was 29. He married Mathilde von Kastl before 1065. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He lived in Cham, Bavaria, Germany in 1033. He died on 15 October 1080, in Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rapoto IV. von Cham est né environ 1034, à Cham, Bezirksamt Cham, Königreich Bayern, son père, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Kastl avant 1065. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il a vécu à Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Allemagne en 1033. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1080, à Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.Schwaben, Chemnitzer Land, Sachsen, Germ: Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Rapoto IV. von Cham um 1034 in Cham, Bezirksamt Cham, Königreich Bayern geboren wurde, war sein Vater Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau 31 und seine Mutter Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt 29. Er hat vor 1065 Mathilde von Kastl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1033 hat er in Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Deutschland gelebt. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1080 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rapoto IV. von Cham è nato il circa 1034 nel Cham, Bezirksamt Cham, Königreich Bayern, il suo padre, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde von Kastl prima del 1065. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Germania nel 1033. Morì il 15 ottobre 1080, nel Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rapoto IV. von Chamが約1034年にクoニグレイチ バイエルンベズイルクサムト チャムチャムで生まれた時，父Diepold I. Graf im Augstgauは31歳，母Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurtは29歳であった。1065年以前にMathilde von Kastlと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1033年にはドイツバイエルンランドクレイス チャムに住んでいた。彼は1080年10月15日にドイツサチセン-アンハルトウエイssエンフエルズホーヘンムoルセンで47歳で死去した。

ko.Schwaben, Chemnitzer Land, Sachsen, Germ: 독일 작센 크레이스 체니츠-랜드 드u렌h즈도르프 슈와벤
ko.lifeSummary: Rapoto IV. von Cham(이)가 대략 1034년 ko니그레이치 베이른 베지르크샘트 챔 챔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1065년 이전 Mathilde von Kastl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1033년도에 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 챔에서 살았다. 그는 1080년 10월 15일 독일 작센-아할트 위ss프스 호헨o센에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rapoto IV. von Cham nasceu aproximadamente 1034, em Cham, Bezirksamt Cham, Königreich Bayern, seu pai, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde von Kastl antes 1065. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele viveu em Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Alemanha em 1033. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1080, em Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 47 anos.

ro.Schwaben, Chemnitzer Land, Sachsen, Germ: Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Germania

ru.Schwaben, Chemnitzer Land, Sachsen, Germ: щвабен, дuрренухлсдорф, крис чемницир-ланд, сачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rapoto IV. von Cham родился около 1034 г. в местности чам, безирксэмт чам, кoниграич беиирн, его отцу по имени Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Kastl перед 1065 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он жил в местности ландкрис чам, беиирн, Германия в 1033 году. Он умер 15 октября 1080 г. в местности хохенмoлсен, виssенфелс, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rapoto IV. von Cham nació aproximadamente 1034, en Cham, Bezirksamt Cham, Königreich Bayern, su papá, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mathilde von Kastl antes de 1065. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Vivió en Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Alemania en 1033. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1080, en Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 47 años.
